mapper.insert: insert into biz_backpacker_notification (user_id, title, content, notify_type, ref_id, is_read, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{notifyType}, #{refId}, '0', #{createTime})
mapper.select: select count(*) from biz_backpacker_notification where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.update: update biz_backpacker_notification set is_read = '1' where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
